statement: In every magma, Equation 2495 (`x = (y * ((x * x) * x)) * z`) implies Equation 4606 (`(x * x) * y = (y * x) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0816
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op (op x x) x)) z)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op (op x x) y) = (op (op y x) y)
